title: Validate Widget Transition from Day 1 to Day 2
description: Test that the persistent header widget on Day 0/1 correctly changes to the floating pill widget starting on Day 2 of the trial.
preconditions: User is in the Trial Corner cohort.
User is on Day 1 of their trial and sees the header widget.
Test environment allows for advancing the user's trial day.

steps.description: 1. Observe the persistent header widget for the user on Day 1.
2. Advance the system time or user's trial status to Day 2.
4. Verify the persistent header widget is no longer present.
5. Verify a floating pill with similar messaging now appears on the homepage.

expected_result: The UI correctly transitions the trial entry point from the header widget to the floating pill as the user progresses from Day 1 to Day 2 of their trial.
